rules: High-tier spells and magic items cannot be craftable from basic vanilla-only materials.
Spellbooks, scrolls, and rare magic components should require region, structure, boss, or rank proof at higher rarities.
Recipe rewrite candidates remain disabled until manually approved.

magic_recipe_entries.proposed_replacement: Add boss, dragon, structure, or Guild-rank proof materials; keep disabled until reviewed.
